description: WingYip standard Language Server Protocol (LSP) configurations per tech stack. Install the LSP matching your repo's primary language for optimal AI agent assistance.

backend.description: C# language server for .NET 8 microservices. Provides IntelliSense, go-to-definition, diagnostics, and symbol search for CQRS/EF Core codebase.

frontend.description: TypeScript language server for React 19 + RSBuild frontend. Supports JSX, Tailwind CSS class completion, and module resolution.

mobile.description: TypeScript language server for React Native 0.72 Android handheld app. Provides mobile-specific JSX and Metro bundler support.

devops.description: YAML language server for Kubernetes manifests, ArgoCD applications, Jenkins pipelines, and Ansible playbooks.

data-engineering.description: SQL language server for SSIS ETL packages and T-SQL stored procedures in Bronze/Silver medallion architecture.

python.description: Python language server for any Python scripts, data pipelines, or automation tooling in the ecosystem.

java.description: Java language server for any custom Keycloak SPI development or Java-based tooling.
